init_command: quasar init factory-quasar-proof-source-y --yes --toolchain solana --test-language rust --rust-framework quasar-svm --template minimal --no-git --verbose
evidence_boundary: Proves a generated Quasar minimal source project can build and test in a clean container. It does not prove product-specific onchain safety.
policy_decision: Use source-pinned Quasar CLI proof for real onchain code-audit claims.
